title: At A Hasty Wedding - (Triolet)
content:
If hours be years the twain are blest,
    For now they solace swift desire
    By bonds of every bond the best,
    If hours be years. The twain are blest
    Do eastern stars slope never west,
    Nor pallid ashes follow fire:
    If hours be years the twain are blest,
    For now they solace swift desire.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Thomas Hardy, titled "At A Hasty Wedding - (Triolet)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
